title: FOI2025-00211: Copy of an FOI response about Peter Kyle's ChatGPT history
body: "   Reference number FOI2025-00211   Date of request 19 March 2025   Date of response 10 April 2025   Outcome Information withheld     The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (the department) received the following request for information which we responded to under the Freedom of Information Act 2000 (FOIA):   I would like to request a copy of the initial request and your response to Chris Stokel-Walker’s Freedom of Information request for the ChatGPT records of Peter Kyle, as reported on by New Scientist:  https://www.newscientist.com/article/2472068-revealed-how-the-uk-tech-secretary-uses-chatgpt-for-policy-advice/   "
